PERF-232.description: Parallel work is fanned out from a loop with errgroup without a concurrency bound such as SetLimit or a semaphore. Unbounded fan-out can overwhelm CPU, memory, and pooled resources.
PERF-232.detection_notes: Match loop-contained errgroup.Go when the enclosing function has no SetLimit or semaphore acquisition.
PERF-232.name: Unbounded Parallel Fan-Out
PERF-232.original_description: Detect unbounded per-item parallelism on bulk work paths

PERF-234.description: A bulk output buffer uses a large fixed Grow capacity or is taken from a pool, reset, and written without an estimated Grow. Prefer sizing from a known workload estimate when possible.
PERF-234.detection_notes: Match .Grow(N) with a large fixed integer literal (N>=4096), or Get().(*bytes.Buffer) plus Reset and Write without any Grow in the unit.
PERF-234.name: Bulk Buffer Without Workload Sizing
PERF-234.original_description: Detect fixed or absent capacity planning for bulk buffers

PERF-235.description: A temporary strings.Builder is filled and then converted with .String() into a WriteString, Write, or append sink. Prefer writing operators/bytes into the destination []byte or *bytes.Buffer directly.
PERF-235.detection_notes: Match strings.Builder in the enclosing function plus WriteString/Write/append of X.String().
PERF-235.name: Intermediate Strings Builder Bridge
PERF-235.original_description: Detect temporary strings.Builder flushed through .String() into a byte sink

PERF-236.description: A signing helper clones an entire buffer before patching fixed-width fields. Prefer an owned writable buffer or in-place mutation when the caller already owns the data.
PERF-236.detection_notes: Match bytes.Clone inside functions whose name contains sign or signature.
PERF-236.name: Full Buffer Clone On Signing Path
PERF-236.original_description: Detect full-buffer copies in signature patching paths

PERF-237.description: errgroup fans out over a dynamic range with no serial short-circuit for tiny worksets (len <= 2). Spawn cost often dominates for one or two items; run those serially first.
PERF-237.detection_notes: Match errgroup.Go inside for-range when a local window before the loop has no len(...) compared to 1/2/3.
PERF-237.name: Always-Parallel Fan-Out Without Tiny-N Serial Path
PERF-237.original_description: Detect errgroup always-parallel paths missing a serial branch for small N

PERF-238.description: Rune membership is tracked with map[rune]bool and updated inside a loop. For BMP-heavy text, a compact bitset or denser set reduces hashing and allocation overhead.
PERF-238.detection_notes: Match map[rune]bool in the unit and map writes of the form m[x] = true inside a for/range loop.
PERF-238.name: Rune Membership Map In Loop
PERF-238.original_description: Detect map[rune]bool membership updates on hot loops

PERF-239.description: An integer-keyed map is written many times (>=6) in one function after make(map[int]…). Dense integer keys are usually better served by a slice or append-only offset records with one final index pass.
PERF-239.detection_notes: Match name := make(map[int…] or map[int64…] then count name[ writes in the enclosing function; flag when count >= 6.
PERF-239.name: Dense Integer Map Write Churn
PERF-239.original_description: Detect many map[int] index writes in one function

PERF-240.description: A hot path allocates make([]byte, len(src)) (or equivalent) without reusing a pooled scratch buffer. Prefer sync.Pool + Reset for large temporary copies of source tables or payloads.
PERF-240.detection_notes: Match make([]byte … len( …) in a loop or encode/build/subset-style function when the function body has no sync.Pool / Pool.Get.
PERF-240.name: Unpooled Len-Sized Byte Scratch
PERF-240.original_description: Detect make([]byte from len(source) without pool reuse on hot paths

PERF-241.description: A signing/CMS-style helper calls asn1.Marshal while also using time.Now, typically re-serializing mostly-static structure every call. Cache immutable DER components and only re-marshal time-varying attributes.
PERF-241.detection_notes: Match asn1.Marshal inside functions whose names contain sign/signature/pkcs/cms when the function body also contains time.Now.
PERF-241.name: ASN1 Remarshal With Fresh Time On Sign Path
PERF-241.original_description: Detect asn1.Marshal + time.Now on signing helpers

PERF-242.description: A loop allocates make([]byte, … len(x)*N …) every iteration for encoding or buffering. Reuse one scratch buffer outside the loop with [:0] growth.
PERF-242.detection_notes: Match make([]byte inside for/range when the size expression includes len( and *.
PERF-242.name: Per-Iteration Encode Scratch Allocation
